# Toronto Music Listings

> Discover Toronto's vibrant music scene with daily updated event listings. From local bands to international acts, find live shows, concerts, and music festivals happening in and around Toronto.

## Main pages

- [All upcoming events](https://torontomusiclistings.com/events): Full calendar of upcoming live music events in Toronto, filterable by venue and date.
- [Venues](https://torontomusiclistings.com/venues): Directory of Toronto music venues we track.

## Machine-readable feeds

- [Sitemap](https://torontomusiclistings.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of every indexable page.
- [RSS feed](https://torontomusiclistings.com/feed.xml): RSS 2.0 feed of upcoming events.
